revision.text:
== Opening ==
This is a [[Fixture article|fixture article phrase]] for corpus testing.
* First list item with enough prose to pass the minimum text threshold easily. * Second list item mentions [https://example.test external label] links.
{{Nested template|{{Inner template|remove me}}|keep outer label}}
{| class="wikitable" |- | Table cell noise |}
<ref>Reference body</ref>
See also [[Category:Hidden category]]. [[File:Example.png|thumb|caption]]
Talk page content that should be skipped by default namespace filter.
User namespace page with plenty of text that should still be skipped because namespace 2 is not included by default.
